description: Synthetic resume QA examples for recruiter-style follow-up questions and summaries.

entries.resume_text:
John Doe
Software Engineer
Experience
Senior Backend Engineer at TechCorp, 2021-Present. Built scalable microservices using Python and Go.
Software Engineer at StartupX, 2019-2021. Developed REST APIs and improved database performance by 40%.
Skills
Python, Go, SQL, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS.
Projects
Built an open-source data pipeline tool used by over 500 developers.
entries.question: Write a short summary of this candidate.
entries.expected_answer: John Doe is a backend-focused software engineer with strong experience in Python, Go, cloud tools, and scalable systems. He has worked on APIs, microservices, and developer-facing platforms.

entries.resume_text:
Jane Smith
Data Scientist
Experience
Machine Learning Engineer at InsightCo, 2021-Present. Built recommendation systems and MLOps pipelines.
Research Assistant at State Lab, 2018-2021. Worked on NLP experiments and data preparation.
Skills
Python, PyTorch, SQL, MLflow, Kubernetes.
Projects
Created a fraud detection model that reduced false positives by 25%.
entries.question: Write a short summary of this candidate.
entries.expected_answer: Jane Smith is a data scientist with strong experience in machine learning, recommendation systems, and MLOps. She has also worked on NLP research and applied analytics projects.

Operations Manager
